headline: General Mills (GIS) Launches Honey Nut Cheerios Protein As Wheaties Picks A'ja Wilson
summary: General Mills (NYSE:GIS) has introduced Honey Nut Cheerios Protein, paired with a "Honey Nuts For You" ring collection and campaign featuring a reality TV personality. Wheaties, a General Mills brand, has selected WNBA star A'ja Wilson for a new special-edition box. General Mills, a large packaged food company with a broad cereal and snacks portfolio, is putting fresh attention on brand storytelling and product extensions. The Honey Nut Cheerios Protein launch and ring campaign aim to keep...
